summary: Excellent front‑of‑house Schoeps recording captures a rain‑to‑sunshine set with standout Rain, Here Comes Sunshine, Corrina→Matilda and Morning Dew.
review: The FO‑B/Schoeps capture is crystal clear with a full, punchy bass and just the right amount of audience ambience – a true audiophile treat. The concert itself is a fan favorite: rain gives way to a radiant Here Comes Sunshine, followed by an inspired Corrina jam that births the first-ever Matilda, and a heartfelt Morning Dew to close. Both the music and the tape quality earn high praise.

ai_rating.rationale: All three reviewers give five‑star ratings, praising both the recording fidelity and the performance; standout songs and a flawless mix push the rating into the top tier.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Very nice audience pull with Schoeps mics, crisp clarity, fuller bass that swells with volume, and a clean front‑of‑house mix – no noticeable dropouts or muddiness.

show_quality.setlist_flow: Rain set segues into a bright Here Comes Sunshine, leading to an inventive Corrina jam that blossoms into the first Matilla, and finishes on an emotional Morning Dew – a flow repeatedly highlighted as magical.

band_member_comments.Phil: Bass described as fuller and more voluminous thanks to the Schoeps capture.
